hooks.command: node skills/design/anti-slop/index.js --scan "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Anti-slop scan passed."}}' || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Anti-slop violations found. Review before shipping."}}'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf [^.]{0,2}$|rm -rf \*|DROP TABLE|truncate -s 0'; then echo 'Destructive command blocked by vibenexus guardrails.' >&2; exit 2; fi
